criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and time spent within the app.
criteria.sources: App analytics, user reviews, industry reports.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and novelty of the app's features and functionalities.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, industry analyses, expert reviews.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The number of downloads and active users.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, developer reports, market research.

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.sources: App store reviews, user surveys, feedback forums.
